description: VERIFIED LIVE: Spotify via content-script DOM extraction (Spotify's Web API needs an OAuth app). The Spotify web player renders playlist and album tracklists in stable [data-testid] markup — public playlists/albums need no login; your own library uses the same markup when logged in — so this tool reads the tracklist straight from the DOM of your open Spotify tab. Navigate the tab to a playlist or album (open.spotify.com/playlist/… or /album/…) and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a public playlist: 26 tracks with title, track url, artist and album extracted correctly.

tools.name: spotify_tracklist
tools.description: Tracks on the current Spotify PLAYLIST or ALBUM page (navigate the tab to open.spotify.com/playlist/<id> or /album/<id> first; scroll to load more — the list virtualizes). Returns each track's title, track url, primary artist and album. VERIFIED (26 tracks).
